rules.processing_time: 30-45 minutes room temperature. Process full 45 minutes when lifting more than 1 level, and when depositing on gray
not_for: Do not blend through mids+ends for Extra Coverage, DreamAge, or UL series
rules.virgin_application: Apply to mids first (10 min), then base (10 min), then ends (remaining time)
rules.retouch_application: Apply to base (20 min), mist Instacure on mids+ends, blend through (remaining time)
rules.porosity_adjustment: On overly porous hair, lightly mist Instacure on mids+ends before pulling through
rules.strand_test: Process 10-20 minutes, rinse, dry to preview

Wait and apply UL-AA, UL-A+ formula for last 10-15 minutes only
For maximum lift, ensure sections are fine enough for complete saturation

shades.name: Extra Blonding Cream
shades.note: Mix 3:1 with SoColor (1.5oz SoColor + 0.5oz EBC + 2oz Developer). Disperses underlying pigment for cleaner blondes, brighter reds, richer browns. Do not use with UL Series, SoRed or HD Series

rules.developer: 20 Volume (6%) Matrix Cream Developer (color + developer in every pouch)

rules.rinsing: Rinse thoroughly, cleanse and condition with Total Results Color Obsessed

rules.note: Do not pull through ends after first application - use SoColor Sync for refreshing. 10 neutral shades available

Do not use any metallic tools (clips, combs)
Do not overlap on previously lightened hair
Only mix with Matrix Cream Developer
